etymology.description: 教(教) (jiào, "teach") + 育(育) (yù, "raise; nurture; education; development")
etymology.interpretation: 教(教) (jiào, "teach") suggests imparting knowledge or skill, while 育(育) (yù, "raise; nurture; education; development") implies fostering growth or development. Together, they form 教育(教育) (jiàoyù), which means "education", capturing both aspects of instruction and development, highlighting the dual focus of providing knowledge and nurturing personal growth and character.

examples.chinese: 教育是社会发展的基础(教育是社會發展的基礎)。
examples.pinyin: Jiàoyù shì shèhuì fāzhǎn de jīchǔ.
examples.english: Education is the foundation of social development.

examples.chinese: 他在大学的教育经历丰富(他在大學的教育經歷豐富)。
examples.pinyin: Tā zài dàxué de jiàoyù jīnglì fēngfù.
examples.english: His educational experience in university is extensive.

examples.chinese: 政府正在努力改善农村地区的教育条件(政府正在努力改善農村地區的教育條件)。
examples.pinyin: Zhèngfǔ zhèngzài nǔlì gǎishàn nóngcūn dìqū de jiàoyù tiáojiàn.
examples.english: The government is working hard to improve the educational conditions in rural areas.
